title: Expand runtime-discipline audit automation for v3.1
description: Broaden runtime-discipline beyond baseline-complete negative and positive paths by adding lower-cost audit paths, stronger audit automation, and additional replayable failure families before v3.1.0.
triage_notes: Follow-up after closing TASK-030 baseline operationalization. This task owns broader audit automation and lower-cost human-audit paths needed for the v3.1.0 release gate.
